creator: eduardo@FreeBSD.org
text:
Certanly related to:

audio/audacity fix with wx 3.2.4:

https://github.com/wxWidgets/wxWidgets/pull/23309
https://github.com/NixOS/nixpkgs/pull/266945#issuecomment-1807292941

https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=275078

Could you update to 2.6.1 version so we can check if it is ready to wx update?

Thanks 

---
/wrkdirs/usr/ports/cad/PrusaSlicer/work/PrusaSlicer-version_2.6.0/src/slic3r/GUI/Plater.cpp:4900:13: warning: use of bitwise '|' with boolean operands [-Wbitwise-instead-of-logical]
        if (sidebar->show_reslice(ready_to_slice) |
            ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
                                                  ||
/wrkdirs/usr/ports/cad/PrusaSlicer/work/PrusaSlicer-version_2.6.0/src/slic3r/GUI/Plater.cpp:4900:13: note: cast one or both operands to int to silence this warning
/wrkdirs/usr/ports/cad/PrusaSlicer/work/PrusaSlicer-version_2.6.0/src/slic3r/GUI/Plater.cpp:5284:11: error: call to member function 'load_files' is ambiguous
    if (! load_files({ into_path(filename) }).empty()) {
          ^~~~~~~~~~
/wrkdirs/usr/ports/cad/PrusaSlicer/work/PrusaSlicer-version_2.6.0/src/slic3r/GUI/Plater.hpp:177:25: note: candidate function
    std::vector<size_t> load_files(const std::vector<boost::filesystem::path>& input_files, bool load_model = true, bool load_config = true, bool imperial_units = false);
                        ^
/wrkdirs/usr/ports/cad/PrusaSlicer/work/PrusaSlicer-version_2.6.0/src/slic3r/GUI/Plater.hpp:181:10: note: candidate function
    bool load_files(const wxArrayString& filenames, bool delete_after_load = false);

7 warnings and 1 error generated.
